fields.description: State abbreviation.
fields.name: state_abbreviation
fields.title: State Abbreviation

fields.description: State name.
fields.name: state_name
fields.title: State Name

fields.description: Reporting period (month).
fields.name: reporting_period
fields.title: Reporting Period

fields.description: Indicates whether state has expanded Medicaid to low-income adults as of the reporting period, based on the expansion’s coverage effective date (Y=expanded Medicaid, N=has not expanded Medicaid).
fields.name: state_expanded_medicaid
fields.title: State Expanded Medicaid

fields.description: Indicates whether data are from a preliminary or updated report (P=Preliminary, U=Updated).
fields.name: preliminary_updated
fields.title: Preliminary or Updated

fields.description: Indicates whether data are from a final report (Y=Final Report, N=Preliminary Report).
fields.name: final_report
fields.title: Final Report

fields.description: The number of Medicaid and CHIP applications received by the Medicaid agency and (if applicable) the separate CHIP agency during the calendar month. Accounts transferred from the Federally-facilitated Marketplace (FFM) are excluded. This metric is calculated as the sum of Performance Indicator elements 5b and 5h.
fields.name: new_applications_submitted_to_medicaid_and_chip_agencies
fields.title: New Applications Submitted to Medicaid and CHIP Agencies

fields.description: Footnotes for the number of Medicaid and CHIP applications received by the Medicaid agency and (if applicable) the separate CHIP agency during the calendar month. Accounts transferred from the Federally-facilitated Marketplace (FFM) are excluded.
fields.name: new_applications_submitted_to_medicaid_and_chip_agencies_footnotes
fields.title: New Applications Submitted to Medicaid and CHIP Agencies - footnotes

fields.description: The total number of applications requesting financial assistance that have been received by the SBM during the calendar month, including applications received via an integrated online Marketplace/Medicaid/CHIP portal. Applications not requesting financial assistance are excluded. The metric is set equal to Performance Indicator data element 5n.
fields.name: applications_for_financial_assistance_submitted_to_the_state_based_marketplace
fields.title: Applications for Financial Assistance Submitted to the State Based Marketplace

fields.description: Footnotes for the total number of applications requesting financial assistance that have been received by the SBM during the calendar month, including applications received via an integrated online Marketplace/Medicaid/CHIP portal.
fields.name: applications_for_financial_assistance_submitted_to_the_state_based_marketplace_footnotes
fields.title: Applications for Financial Assistance Submitted to the State Based Marketplace - footnotes

fields.description: The number of Medicaid and CHIP applications received by the Medicaid agency, (if applicable) the separate CHIP agency, and a State-based Marketplace (if applicable) during the calendar month. Accounts transferred from the Federally-facilitated Marketplace (FFM) are excluded. This metric is set equal to Performance Indicator data element 5a.
fields.name: total_applications_for_financial_assistance_submitted_at_state_level
fields.title: Total Applications for Financial Assistance Submitted at State Level

fields.description: Footnotes for the number of Medicaid and CHIP applications received by the Medicaid agency, (if applicable) the separate CHIP agency, and a State-based Marketplace (if applicable) during the calendar month.
fields.name: total_applications_for_financial_assistance_submitted_at_state_level_footnotes
fields.title: Total Applications for Financial Assistance Submitted at State Level - footnotes

fields.description: The total number of Medicaid eligible determinations made (processed) at application by the state agency during the calendar month. This metric is calculated as the sum of Performance Indicator elements 9d and 9h when either are greater than 0; otherwise, the metric is set equal to Performance Indicator element 9a.
fields.name: individuals_determined_eligible_for_medicaid_at_application
fields.title: Individuals Determined Eligible for Medicaid at Application

fields.description: Footnotes for the total number of Medicaid eligible determinations made (processed) at application by the state agency during the calendar month.
fields.name: individuals_determined_eligible_for_medicaid_at_application_footnotes
fields.title: Individuals Determined Eligible for Medicaid at Application - footnotes

fields.description: The total number of CHIP eligible determinations made (processed) at application by the state agency during the calendar month. This metric is set equal to Performance Indicator element 9k when element 9k is greater than 0; otherwise, the metric is set equal to Performance Indicator element 9j.
fields.name: individuals_determined_eligible_for_chip_at_application
fields.title: Individuals Determined Eligible for CHIP at Application

fields.description: Footnotes for the total number of CHIP eligible determinations made (processed) at application by the state agency during the calendar month.
fields.name: individuals_determined_eligible_for_chip_at_application_footnotes
fields.title: Individuals Determined Eligible for CHIP at Application - footnotes

fields.description: The total number of Medicaid and CHIP eligible determinations made (processed) at application by the state agency during the calendar month. This metric is set equal to the sum of the “Individuals Determined Eligible for Medicaid at Application” and “Individuals Determined Eligible for CHIP at Application” metrics in this dataset.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations

fields.description: Footnotes for the total number of Medicaid and CHIP eligible determinations made (processed) at application by the state agency during the calendar month.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_footnotes
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations - footnotes

fields.description: A point-in-time count of the number of children enrolled in Medicaid and the number of individuals enrolled in CHIP as of the last day of each month. Note that since some states use CHIP to extend coverage to adults, this measure is not strictly limited to children in all states. Includes only those individuals who are eligible for comprehensive benefits. This metric is calculated as the sum of Performance Indicator elements 8c, 8f, and 8h when 8c and 8f are greater than 0; otherwise, the metric is set equal to 0.
fields.name: medicaid_and_chip_child_enrollment
fields.title: Medicaid and CHIP Child Enrollment

fields.description: Footnotes for a point-in-time count of the number of children enrolled in Medicaid and the number of individuals enrolled in CHIP (including separate CHIP and Medicaid-expansion CHIP) as of the last day of each month.
fields.name: medicaid_and_chip_child_enrollment_footnotes
fields.title: Medicaid and CHIP Child Enrollment - footnotes

fields.description: A point-in-time count of the number of individuals enrolled in Medicaid or CHIP as of the last day of each month. Includes only those individuals who are eligible for comprehensive benefits. This metric is calculated as the sum of Performance Indicator elements 8a and 8h.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_enrollment
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Enrollment

fields.description: Footnotes for a point-in-time count of the number of individuals enrolled in Medicaid or CHIP as of the last day of each month.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_enrollment_footnotes
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Enrollment - footnotes

fields.description: A point-in-time count of the number of individuals enrolled in Medicaid as of the last day of each month. Includes only those individuals who are eligible for comprehensive benefits. This metric is set equal to Performance Indicator data element 8a.
fields.name: total_medicaid_enrollment
fields.title: Total Medicaid Enrollment

fields.description: Footnotes for a point-in-time count of the number of individuals enrolled in Medicaid as of the last day of each month.
fields.name: total_medicaid_enrollment_footnotes
fields.title: Total Medicaid Enrollment - footnotes

fields.description: A point-in-time count of the number of individuals enrolled in CHIP (including separate CHIP and Medicaid-expansion CHIP) as of the last day of each month. Note that since some states use CHIP to extend coverage to adults, this measure is not strictly limited to children in all states. Includes only those individuals who are eligible for comprehensive benefits. This metric is set equal to Performance Indicator data element 8h.
fields.name: total_chip_enrollment
fields.title: Total CHIP Enrollment

fields.description: Footnotes for a point-in-time count of the number of individuals enrolled in CHIP (including separate CHIP and Medicaid expansion CHIP) as of the last day of each month.
fields.name: total_chip_enrollment_footnotes
fields.title: Total CHIP Enrollment - footnotes

fields.description: A point-in-time count of the number of individuals enrolled in adult MAGI and non-MAGI Medicaid as of the last day of each month. Includes only those individuals who are eligible for comprehensive benefits. This metric is calculated as the sum of Performance Indicator elements 8d and 8g.
fields.name: total_medicaid_adult_enrollment
fields.title: Total Adult Medicaid Enrollment

fields.description: Footnotes for a point-in-time count of the number of individuals enrolled in adult MAGI and non-MAGI Medicaid as of the last day of each month.
fields.name: total_medicaid_adult_enrollment_footnotes
fields.title: Total Adult Medicaid Enrollment - footnotes

fields.description: The number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred less than 24 hours after the date the application was received by the agency. Determinations made using non-MAGI rules, applications that have not yet received a final determination, and determinations at annual renewal are not included in this metric. This metric is set equal to Performance Indicator data element 12f.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_in_less_than_24_hours
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed in Less than 24 Hours

fields.description: Footnotes for the number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred less than 24 hours after the date the application was received by the agency.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_in_less_than_24_hours_footnotes
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed in Less than 24 Hours - footnotes

fields.description: The number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred between 24 hours and 7 days after the date the application was received by the agency. Determinations made using non-MAGI rules, applications that have not yet received a final determination, and determinations at annual renewal are not included in this metric. This metric is set equal to Performance Indicator data element 12g.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_between_24_hours_and_7_days
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed Between 24 Hours and 7 Days

fields.description: Footnotes for the number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred between 24 hours and 7 days after the date the application was received by the agency.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_between_24_hours_and_7_days_footnotes
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed Between 24 Hours and 7 Days - footnotes

fields.description: The number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred between 8 days and 30 days after the date the application was received by the agency. Determinations made using non-MAGI rules, applications that have not yet received a final determination, and determinations at annual renewal are not included in this metric. This metric is set equal to Performance Indicator data element 12h.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_between_8_days_and_30_days
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed Between 8 Days and 30 Days

fields.description: Footnotes for the number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred between 8 days and 30 days after the date the application was received by the agency.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_between_8_days_and_30_days_footnotes
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed Between 8 Days and 30 Days - footnotes

fields.description: The number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred between 31 days and 45 days after the date the application was received by the agency. Determinations made using non-MAGI rules, applications that have not yet received a final determination, and determinations at annual renewal are not included in this metric. This metric is set equal to Performance Indicator data element 12i.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_between_31_days_and_45_days
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed Between 31 Days and 45 Days

fields.description: Footnotes for the number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred between 31 days and 45 days after the date the application was received by the agency.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_between_31_days_and_45_days_footnotes
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed Between 31 Days and 45 Days - footnotes

fields.description: The number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred more than 45 days after the date the application was received by the agency. Determinations made using non-MAGI rules, applications that have not yet received a final determination, and determinations at annual renewal are not included in this metric. This metric is set equal to Performance Indicator data element 12j.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_in_more_than_45_days
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed in More than 45 Days

fields.description: Footnotes for the number of final determinations on applications made by the Medicaid and CHIP agency using MAGI rules that occurred more than 45 days after the date the application was received by the agency.
fields.name: total_medicaid_and_chip_determinations_processed_in_more_than_45_days_footnotes
fields.title: Total Medicaid and CHIP Determinations Processed in More than 45 Days - footnotes

fields.description: The total number of calls received by each call center or hotline that serves Medicaid and CHIP applicants or enrollees in the state. Call centers reported in this metric may serve additional state human services programs such as SNAP, but the metric excludes calls received by call centers that primarily serve an SBM. The metric is set equal to the value states report in Performance Indicator data element 1.
fields.name: total_call_center_volume
fields.title: Total Call Center Volume (Number of Calls)

fields.description: Footnotes for the total number of calls received by each call center or hotline that serves Medicaid and CHIP applicants or enrollees in the state.
fields.name: total_call_center_volume_footnotes
fields.title: Total Call Center Volume (Number of Calls) - footnotes

fields.description: The average wait time in whole minutes for calls received by all call centers reported in the metric above. Wait times between 0 and 29 seconds are rounded down to the nearest whole minute, including 0 zero minutes. The metric is set equal to the value states report in Performance Indicator data element 2.
fields.name: average_call_center_wait_time
fields.title: Average Call Center Wait Time (Minutes)

fields.description: Footnotes for the average wait time in whole minutes for calls received by all call centers reported in the metric above. Wait times between 0 and 29 seconds are rounded down to the nearest whole minute, including 0 zero minutes.
fields.name: average_call_center_wait_time_footnotes
fields.title: Average Call Center Wait Time (Minutes) - footnotes

fields.description: The average abandonment rate for all call centers reported in the call center volume metric above. The abandonment rate is calculated as the number of calls abandoned by the caller (numerator) divided by the total call volume (denominator). The metric is set equal to the value states report in Performance Indicator data element 3.
fields.name: average_call_center_abandonment_rate
fields.title: Average Call Center Abandonment Rate

fields.description: Footnotes for the average abandonment rate for all call centers reported in the call center volume metric above.
fields.name: average_call_center_abandonment_rate_footnotes
fields.title: Average Call Center Abandonment Rate - footnotes
